fix.item: Fixed asset marker sprite orientation bug.
Fixed error caused by null model path.

addition.item: Added vertical positioning controls for camera.
Upgraded SparkJS to version 2.0 and added support for LOD streaming of .rad files.

note.item: Now the engine is more compatible with splats which have the camera set to zero vertical position.

fix.item: Fixed error caused by loading room with zero assets.
Fixed action button reference when unloading/reloading splat view.

addition.item: Added ability to embed asset models into room models.
Added vertical positioning controls for 3d assets.

change.item: Better formatting on news items on dashboard.
Made asset not inherit the roomOrigin.y value.
Preventing scroll event handling on map when top document has scroll room.

fix.item: Fixed issue with splat loading in Firefox on iOS.

note.item: First update after acceptance into the Joomla Extensions Directory.
